results.evidence: Response explicitly says this is not a full dependency-governance review unless packages, lockfiles, or package managers change.
Response says to inspect conventions, ask if mixed/ambiguous, and record preference in .spec-to-ship/local-preferences.md or project instructions.

results.assertion: does not add package risk analysis unnecessarily
results.evidence: Response explicitly says not to perform license, vulnerability, transitive dependency, or package-size analysis just to choose a test command.
